messages.content: # Here is a list of all cars that **WILL NOT** save points and **WILL NOT** count towards the leaderboard

## Current Vaulted Traffic Density
> - Points on SRP (Shutoko Revival Project) Rush Hour traffic have been disabled.
> -# This is due to a points exploit that utilises this configuration. We're working on getting this mode re-enabled soon.
